articles.title: South Africa Women's maiden tour to Zimbabwe to feature five T20Is
articles.description: The two teams have never faced each other in this format

articles.title: Babar returns while understrength Australia look to 2027 and beyond
articles.description: Some familiar names return for Pakistan while Australia have fresh faces in the absence of a number of frontline stars

articles.title: Pakistan's famous cheerleader 'Chacha Cricket' to retire this year
articles.description: The third ODI against Australia in Lahore will be his last at home, though he is hoping to cheer Pakistan on in England later in the year

articles.title: Blundell, Foxcroft and Smith give New Zealand vice-grip on Ireland Test
articles.description: Blundell and Foxcroft helped New Zealand make 490 before Smith's six for helped them enforce the follow-on

articles.title: Munisar replaces Brathwaite as West Indies name T20 World Cup squad
articles.description: The same squad will face Ireland and Pakistan in a tri-nation T20I series, which got underway on May 28

articles.title: Harmanpreet: India looking for 'clarity' on best XI ahead of T20 World Cup
articles.description: Hole left by absent allrounders could mean opportunities for Radha Yadav and Bharti Fulmali

articles.title: World Cup contenders England and India hope to get their combinations right
articles.description: England will want time in the middle for the new opening pair of Sophia Dunkley and Alice Capsey, while India will want a repeat of the historic first T20I series win in England last year

articles.title: Ireland host rare home Test as New Zealand seek red-ball rhythm
articles.description: This will be the first ever Test between the two countries, who have both had little red-ball practice lately

articles.title: Marsh out of Pakistan series with ankle injury, Inglis to captain
articles.description: Stand-in skipper Marsh has been withdrawn due to an ankle injury with his availability for the Bangladesh tour to be determined

articles.title: Sri Lanka name Kusal Mendis ODI and T20I captain for WI tour
articles.description: Wanindu Hasaranga is set to return to action in ODIs and T20Is since tearing his hamstring early in the T20 World Cup in February

articles.title: Hayley Matthews to lead West Indies Women's squad at ICC Women's T20 World Cup 2026
articles.description: Other senior names like Qiana Joseph, Deandra Dottin and Afy Fletcher have also been announced in the 15-member squad.
